title: Test Post - Working Now!
body:
This is a test post to verify the NEW two repo workflow is working correctly.

Features Being Tested:
- Issue to JSON conversion
- Automatic sync to hosting repo
- Eleventy site rebuild  
- GitHub Pages deployment

Updated to trigger the new workflow!

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body: Testing workflow after fixing gh CLI authentication issue.
